query: SK Hynix Q2 2026 earnings release date confirmed - when will SK Hynix report second quarter 2026 results? Check Investor Relations calendar and DART filings for July 2026 date.
answer:
I've completed the research on SK Hynix's Q2 2026 earnings release date.

**Bottom line:** The Q2 2026 date is **NOT officially confirmed** in the sources I could access. As of July 13, 2026, SK Hynix had not yet released 2Q26 results.

- **Estimated date:** July 22, 2026 (per aggregator stockinvest.us)
- **Historically-supported window:** July 22–24, 2026 (SK Hynix consistently reports Q2 in the fourth week of July, usually a Thursday; 2Q25 was July 24, 2025)
- **Could not locate** an official IR calendar entry or specific DART filing confirming the date. SK Hynix typically issues an earnings conference call invitation ~1–2 weeks before, and none for 2Q26 had surfaced yet.

The AskNews tools hit a credit limit and stockinvest.us/finbox blocked direct fetches (403), but I cross-validated the timing pattern through official SK Hynix newsroom, PR Newswire, and MarketScreener sources.

sources.title: SK hynix (000660) Earnings Report: Key Numbers & Transcript Summary
sources.snippet: Jun 30, 2026 (Upcoming) | Release date | Jul 22, 2026 | EPS estimate ₩68,565.39 | Revenue estimate 83.624T

sources.title: SK hynix Announces Q2 2025 Financial Results
sources.snippet: Seoul, July 24, 2025 - SK hynix Inc. announced today revenues of 22.232 trillion won, operating profit of 9.2129 trillion won.

sources.title: SK hynix Announces 1Q26 Financial Results
sources.snippet: Reports revenues of 52.5763 trillion won, operating profit of 37.6103 trillion won, net profit of 40.3459 trillion won. Record-high quarterly performance driven by AI demand.

sources.title: SK hynix Inc.: Company Events Publications and Financial Calendar | MarketScreener
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 Earnings Release: April 22, 2026; Q4 2025 Earnings Release: January 28, 2026 (calendar contained template artifacts for Q2).

sources.title: SK Hynix Q2 profit seen at 60-70 trillion won on AI memory demand
sources.snippet: On June 19, market analysts generally expect the company's second-quarter 2026 operating profit to range between 60 trillion and 70 trillion KRW.

sources.title: Shareholders Meeting / IR Event - SK hynix
sources.snippet: Official SK Hynix IR page; did not display a confirmed 2Q26 earnings date in accessed content.
